name: support-triage-agent-v2
title: Support Triage Agent — execution-ready package
mvp_definition: Supervised triage pipeline (ingest -> classify -> retrieve -> grounded draft -> route -> human-approved send) with full audit, PII containment, and a bounded loop. Auto-send (FR-008) is excluded and gated to PH-2.
go_no_go: GO for PH-1; PH-2 (auto-send) conditional on EXP-001 PASS and ADR-0004 approval
